description: Closed agent role registry for lore. resolve_model_for_role(<role>) consults this list before consulting the per-repo and user role->model bindings; resolve_route_for_role(<role>) interprets the resulting scalar against the closed framework registry without changing precedence. A role may carry an optional fallback_role: when the queried role's own layers all miss short of the overlay default, the resolver re-resolves once with the fallback role (used by the class-qualified worker roles to inherit plain worker's binding). Adding a role requires updating this file, scripts/lib.sh resolve_model_for_role, tui/internal/config/framework.go ResolveModelForRoleInCeremony, adapters/settings.schema.json ($defs/role_id enum + $defs/roles_map_overlay properties), and tests/frameworks/roles.bats.

roles.description: Coordinator agent that plans phases, spawns workers, and gates phase transitions on returned reports.
Task-iterating implementation agent that claims tasks from a queue and emits Tier 2 evidence anchored to file:line ranges.

Worker role for tasks a spec author labeled `[class: mechanical]` — uniform text substitution with no design judgment. Bind it to a cheaper model to route mechanical work down-tier; unbound it resolves to plain worker via fallback_role.

Worker role for tasks a spec author labeled `[class: judgment-dense]` — design-bearing work that must land on a capable model. Bind it to hold judgment-dense work at a capability ceiling; unbound it resolves to plain worker via fallback_role.
Task-iterating investigation agent that explores design space and produces synthesis reports without modifying source files.
Single-batch evaluator that consumes a finished artifact (PR, plan, capture) and returns a verdict against a rubric.
Single-batch verdict agent that scores candidates against a closed rubric and emits a structured pass/fail decision (correctness gate, batch suitability).
Lightweight synthesis agent that compresses transcripts, capture queues, or review threads into thematic prose.
Persistent domain-consultant agent that workers query mid-task via SendMessage for guidance on a declared scope; spawned by /implement when phases declare an Advisors block.
Resolution fallback consulted when a role binding is unset; never named directly by a call site.
